response.justification: While Bogdan is a strong, well-rounded senior engineer with proven ability to ship products and lead teams, he does not meet the core technical requirements for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ programming; his resume shows only ~6 months at National Instruments plus thesis work. Additionally, the role demands 5+ years of deep cloud compute platform experience, whereas his background is broader full-stack and distributed systems work. His strengths lie in product engineering and team leadership rather than infrastructure and compute platform architecture.
strengths: Proven track record shipping high-impact products (WatchUp Apple TV app ranked top 10 in US)
Hands-on distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency optimization
Multiple staff-level roles with demonstrated mentoring and code quality discipline (TDD, refactoring dojos, code kata sessions)
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~6 months of explicit C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement; primary languages are TypeScript, DLang, and Java
Lacks deep cloud compute platform expertise; experience is broader full-stack/backend rather than infrastructure/compute-focused
No evidence of mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers specifically; leadership experience is broader but not in this domain
